name: io.github.Servosity/datto-bcdr-mcp
title: Datto BCDR MCP
description: Sync your whole Datto BCDR fleet into local SQLite and answer the questions the per-appliance

environmentVariables.name: DATTO_BCDR_PUBLIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Set the DATTO_BCDR_PUBLIC_KEY credential for the Datto BCDR MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: DATTO_BCDR_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Set the DATTO_BCDR_SECRET_KEY credential for the Datto BCDR MCP server.
